# Resource Manager API, gRPC: ServiceService

Use this API to create, list, view, update, soft-delete, and undelete services.

## Methods

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [GetService](./get-service.md) | Returns a single service by its UUID. |
| [ListServices](./list-services.md) | Returns a paginated list of services under the specified workspace UUID. |
| [CreateService](./create-service.md) | Creates a new service under the specified workspace UUID. |
| [UpdateService](./update-service.md) | Updates mutable fields of an existing service. |
| [DeleteService](./delete-service.md) | Soft-deletes a service by its UUID. |
| [UndeleteService](./undelete-service.md) | Restores a previously soft-deleted service. |
